## Proposal

**What section of the spec does this affect?** [e.g., Resolution Order, Scopes, File Naming]

**Current behavior:** [What does the spec say now?]

**Proposed behavior:** [What should it say instead?]

## Rationale

**Why is this change needed?** [Explain the problem it solves or the improvement it brings]

**Who benefits?** [Users, tool creators, AI agents, providers]

## Impact

**Backward compatibility:** [Does this break existing AGENTS.md setups? If so, what's the migration path?]

**Agents affected:** [List agents that would need to update their behavior]

**CLI changes needed:** [Would the .agents CLI need code changes?]

## Alternatives Considered

[What other approaches were considered and why were they rejected?]
